Name: HyEssentialsX
Description: HyEssentialsX is a full-featured essentials plugin for Hytale, built to be the backbone of modern survival and community servers. Inspired by the convenience and reliability of EssentialsX, HyEssentialsX bundles the core quality-of-life features players except without the bloat, while giving server owners clean configuration, strong permissions support, and performance-first design.
